note: cold sdd-spec-judge round 1: oracle+architect PASS, builder FAIL on two coverage gaps — (1) no error-case scenario for an unresolvable artifact-type; (2) frozen-vs-unfrozen touched .feature ambiguity (scenario-detail gate over-scoped to frozen; glossary conflated behavioral-suite with frozen). Also removed a premature @frozen tag staged before the spec gate (architect observation — freeze is the gate's result, not producer-staged). Fix: added unresolvable-artifact-type scenario (file still counts as touched node, artifact-type=unknown), gated the scenario rung on the .feature extension (not resolve-governances), generalized scenario-detail to any touched .feature (frozen or not), added a whole-record determinism scenario; corrected README steps 3-4 + glossary. Re-judged fresh cold.

cold sdd-impl-judge round 1: IMPLEMENTATION_PASS false — mutation testing caught a real defect: assembleCorrection computed each file's artifactType but never surfaced it into the returned Correction (NodeDetail.files was bare string[]), so two frozen scenarios ('each changed file carries the artifact-type resolved for it', 'a changed file whose artifact-type does not resolve still counts as a touched node') were unmet and the producer's tests passed even when the value was garbled. Fix (code, not the frozen .feature): NodeDetail.files is now NodeFile[] {path,artifactType}; TOON render shows path(artifactType); strengthened both scenario tests + the per-node-files test to assert artifactType is observable; added a longest-prefix fileToNode test (judge's non-blocking observation). Mutation re-check: garbling artifactType now fails 3 tests (had teeth). Root pnpm verify green. Re-judged fresh cold.
